_note: Ready-to-insert interactive_image block for a generalized animal cell (Class 11 Cell: Unit of Life). Direct pairing with the plant-cell round already shipped. Image keyed via prepare_illustration.py's new 'white' background mode (added 2026-07-15) -- the source PNG had an opaque white background despite the prompt asking for solid deep-charcoal #121316 (visible live in ChatGPT's UI as dark, but the downloaded raster was flattened onto white). Hotspots authored by visual inspection of the cropped/keyed webp, NOT yet browser-verified live -- recommend a quick pass in the prototype to confirm tap-target placement before shipping, especially any nested/adjacent structures.
alt: A generalized animal cell, cutaway view
caption: 📸 Tap each dot to explore — or hit 'Test yourself' to play Label Sprint

hotspots.label: Cell membrane
hotspots.detail: The selectively permeable boundary enclosing the cell's contents.

hotspots.label: Nucleus
hotspots.detail: Contains the cell's DNA; controls all cellular activities.

hotspots.label: Nucleolus
hotspots.detail: A dense region inside the nucleus where ribosomal RNA is made.

hotspots.label: Endoplasmic reticulum
hotspots.detail: A network of membranes involved in protein and lipid synthesis and transport.

hotspots.label: Golgi apparatus
hotspots.detail: Modifies, sorts, and packages proteins and lipids for delivery.

hotspots.label: Mitochondrion
hotspots.detail: The **powerhouse of the cell** — generates ATP through cellular respiration.

hotspots.label: Centrioles
hotspots.detail: Paired cylindrical structures that organise the spindle fibres during cell division.

hotspots.label: Lysosome
hotspots.detail: Contains digestive enzymes that break down waste material and cell debris.

hotspots.label: Cytoplasm
hotspots.detail: The jelly-like fluid filling the cell, holding all the organelles in place.

generation_prompt: A clean modern educational anatomy illustration of a generalized animal cell, shown as a cutaway cross-section revealing its internal organelles. Show these structures clearly separated and individually distinguishable: cell membrane, nucleus with nucleolus and chromatin, rough and smooth endoplasmic reticulum, Golgi apparatus, mitochondria, ribosomes, lysosomes, centrioles, and cytoplasm. Style: semi-realistic medical-textbook illustration, soft even studio lighting, smooth clean surfaces, a muted natural palette (soft blues, teals, warm pinks for organelles). Calm and flat: no glossy highlights, no neon, no glow, no 3D-render sheen. Composition: a single rounded animal cell, centered and filling the frame, generous even margins. Solid uniform deep-charcoal background, hex #121316, edge to edge. Absolutely no text, no labels, no numbers, no letters, no leader lines, no arrows, no legend, no watermark -- the illustration only. Portrait 3:4, high resolution.
